name: eventy-life
description: Plateforme française de voyages de groupe accompagnés - Monorepo
author: Eventy Team

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.format: cd frontend && npm run format && cd ../backend && npm run format
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/.next backend/dist
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
